The '''Adjudicator''' was a small palm-sized hold-out [[Slugthrower pistol/Legends|slugthrower pistol]] manufactured by [[Czerka Arms/Legends|Czerka Arms]].<ref name="GFT" />

==Description==
One of the few non-[[Blaster/Legends|energy]] weapons commercially available in large quantities all over the galaxy,<ref name="GFT" /> it was used by civilians as a personal defence weapon.<ref name="ROE">''[[Rules of Engagement: The Rebel SpecForce Handbook]]''</ref> The weapon was sold with a [[wrist clamp magnetic holstering lock]]; when triggered, the spring-activated rig would thrust the weapon into the user's hands, allowing for a quick and nasty surprise.<ref name="GFT" />

The Adjudicator shared many attributes with [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blasters]], such as its small size<ref name="CWCG" /> and the ability to easily conceal it within a sleeve or pocket.<ref name="AEG" /> The pistol had a capacity of four shots,<ref name="GFT" /> but compensated for this with sheer stopping power. However, the Adjudicator was slow to reload, leading to many to use it as a back-up weapon.<ref name="CWCG" />

==Variants==
[[File:Allicance_Adjudicator.png|left|thumb|Alliance Adjudicator]]
A modified version of the Adjudicator was used by the [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance Special Forces]]. Completely silenced and suitable for stealth missions, this variant of the stock Adjudicator was widely used by Alliance [[Infiltrator (starfighter)|Infiltrators]].The original wrist-mounted holster was removed, and the weapon was kept on a belt, wrist, or ankle holster - sans spring rig.<ref name="ROE" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Missions 4: Destroy the Liquidator]]'' {{C|Game card}}
